items.title: Halftime: Pistons 59, Cavs 49. Much better offensive performance compared to Thursday despite an uneven game from Okorie (7 pts, 2-7 overall, 5 stls, 3 assts, 3 tos). Lanier (17 pts, 5-8 from 3) and Williams (12 pts, 4-6 from 3) are lighting it up.

items.title: 5 years ago (!), the Milwaukee Bucks won the NBA title - in July.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
5 years ago (!), the Milwaukee Bucks won the NBA title - in July.
It is wild to think about that now.

My shell toes melted walking through just a couple blocks through downtown Phoenix.
www.jsonline.com/story/sports...

media.title: 5 years ago, Bucks' NBA title team was shaped by mental toughness, pandemic
media.description: July 20 is the 5-year anniversary of Game 6, when Giannis Antetokounmpo scored 50 points and the Bucks became world champions.

items.title: If you read my article on Braden Smith's SL debut, you know I called for more off-ball switching to keep Jalen Slawson as the low-man. Watch Slawson. Swaps places w/ Taelon Peter & ends up swatting the shot at the rim.
items.author: Caitlin Cooper
items.body_excerpt:
If you read my article on Braden Smith's SL debut, you know I called for more off-ball switching to keep Jalen Slawson as the low-man. Watch Slawson. Swaps places w/ Taelon Peter & ends up swatting the shot at the rim.

More observations from Game 2: www.patreon.com/basketballsh...

items.title: Pistons are up 24-14 with 2:28 left in the 1st. Chaz has 17 points on 6-8 overall shooting and 5-7 from 3. Playing like he's ready to wrap up his time in Vegas.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Pistons are up 24-14 with 2:28 left in the 1st. Chaz has 17 points on 6-8 overall shooting and 5-7 from 3. Playing like he's ready to wrap up his time in Vegas. 

Okorie has 4 points and scored their last bucket, a coast-to-coast layup. His handle is so quick.
